# Dialect stub — Maghrebi (Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia, etc.)

**Scope:** Routing cues — heavy French/Latin mix possible in UI and marketing.

## When to use

- Maghreb-only SKUs, local entities, or dialect-specific social.

## Notes

- Register shifts between Darija and MSA are brand-dependent; **never assume one-size Darija** across MA/DZ/TN.
- UI may mix Arabic RTL with French LTR — coordinate with `rtl-specialist` for layout.

## Escalation

Legal/regulated and Darija-first broadcast → **local vendor**.
